commands.review_summary:
The branch adds hook and cron warnings for returned isolated-run errors, prefers cron diagnostic summaries in hook announcements, adds regression tests, and updates `CHANGELOG.md`.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns an error with `cron-preflight` diagnostics for disallowed `payload.model`, while the hook handler only summarizes/announces returned errors without a warning. The PR body also includes before/after Gateway terminal output for the same rejected-model path.
